channel.title: Posts on Jonayed Hossan Gazi
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Jonayed Hossan Gazi

item.title: The simplest blog is just text files
item.description: Moved zuna.id from WordPress to Hugo on GitHub Pages. No server, no database, no maintenance.

item.title: Google’s NotebookLM: A Game-Changer for Education and a Prime Example of AI’s Potential
item.description: Google's NotebookLM is a source-grounded AI research assistant that's transforming how students, educators, and researchers interact with information.

item.title: Manus AI: The Revolutionary Autonomous AI Agent
item.description: Discover Manus AI, the world's first fully autonomous AI agent that can handle complex tasks independently. Learn about its features, capabilities, and how it could change the future of work and life.

item.title: Python Guide: From Beginner to Pro
item.description: Your one-stop guide to mastering Python. This comprehensive blog post covers everything from the basics to advanced concepts, perfect for beginners and intermediate learners. Start your Python journey today!

item.title: Gladiator – the Epic Tale of Vengeance, Justice, and Resilience
item.description: The Roman Empire, with its grandeur, intrigue, and brutal spectacles, has always fascinated me, and few films capture its essence as powerfully as Gladiator (2000).

item.title: The Best Free Web Hosting Control Panel I’ve Used: Why I Chose Virtualmin Over cPanel
item.description: Discover why Virtualmin is the best free alternative to cPanel for managing web hosting. A personal comparison of control panels including CyberPanel, Webmin, and more.

item.title: The Past Is a Place of Reference, Not Residence
item.description: Life goes on, and so can you. A reflection on purpose, relationships, and why no one enters your life by accident.

item.title: When You Pass the Tree Twice, You’re Surely Lost!
item.description: When you pass the tree twice, you are surely lost — a metaphor for life choices, emotional loops, and the patterns we repeat.

item.title: Eyes to a Wider World: Reading Mother by Maxim Gorky
item.description: Reading Mother by Maxim Gorky introduced me to the struggles of Russian workers and the spirit of revolution. A quiet but powerful discovery that still shapes my appreciation of human resilience.

item.title: The Brighter the Flame, the Darker the Shadow It Casts: A Journey of Self-Realization
item.description: Explore the philosophical meaning of “The brighter the flame, the darker the shadow it casts” and how it relates to self-realization, ego, and shadow work.

item.title: “It’s Better to Be Slapped by the Truth Than Kissed by a Lie” – A Powerful Russian Proverb That Still Matters Today
item.description: Explore the meaning and timeless wisdom behind the Russian proverb “It’s better to be slapped by the truth than kissed by a lie.” Learn how honesty, even when painful, leads to growth.

item.title: How Text Editors and IDEs Made My Development Super Fast: From Notepad to VS Code, NetBeans, and PyCharm
item.description: See how moving from Notepad to powerful tools like VS Code, NetBeans, and PyCharm transformed my development speed and changed my coding journey forever.

item.title: Best Text Editors for Developers and Everyday Users: Notepad, Sublime Text, VS Code, Nano & Vim Explained
item.description: Explore the best text editors for both developers and general users. Learn how Notepad, Sublime Text, VS Code, Nano, and Vim boost productivity, coding, and everyday editing.

item.title: Easy Tunneling Explained: How to Run Your Local App Online with Ngrok, FRP, Cloudflare, and SSH Tunnels
item.description: Discover how to expose your local web apps to the internet using tunneling tools like Ngrok, FRP, Cloudflare Tunnel, and SSH. A beginner-friendly guide to understand tunneling and run apps globally.

item.title: How to Create a Bootable Linux or Windows USB Using Rufus and SD Memory Card Formatter
item.description: Learn step-by-step how to create a bootable USB for Linux or Windows using Rufus and SD Memory Card Formatter. Simple guide for beginners to install OS from USB drive.

item.title: Building a Bangla-Specific Search Engine: A Comprehensive Guide
item.description: Introduction This document provides a comprehensive guide to developing a modern, functional search engine specifically tailored for Bangladeshi origin and Bangla-language websites.

item.title: Android Development with Kotlin: A Beginner’s Guide
item.description: Welcome to the exciting world of Android app development with Kotlin!

item.title: Exploring the Wapka URL Library: A Comprehensive Guide to URL Processing
item.description: Discover how to use Wapka’s URL Library to encode, decode, parse, and rewrite URLs for mobile websites. Learn with examples and best practices for SEO-friendly URLs.

item.title: Understanding Wapka’s Request Library: A Complete Guide to Handling HTTP Requests
item.description: Learn how to use Wapka’s Request Library to handle HTTP requests in Lua. Explore the req table, its hierarchy, and practical examples for web development.

item.title: Exploring Wapka’s Server Library: A Comprehensive Guide to Handling HTTP Requests with Lua
item.description: Learn how to use Wapka’s server library in Lua to handle HTTP requests, manage templates, set headers, and more. A complete guide with examples for web developers.

item.title: Mastering Wapka’s Lua Sandbox Environment for Web Development
item.description: Explore Wapka’s Lua Sandbox Environment, a secure and customized Lua 5.1 platform for web development. Learn about its features, libraries, and how to get started.

item.title: Gods of Egypt – A Mythical Ride Through Divine Chaos
item.description: If you’re in the mood for a visually spectacular, action-packed fantasy that dives into the clash of gods and mortals, Gods of Egypt (2016) is a wild ride worth taking.

item.title: How to Install an HTML Template on Wapka and Configure a Reverse Proxy
item.description: Learn how to install an HTML template on Wapka and configure a reverse proxy with NGINX. Create ad-free, dynamic websites with Wapka’s powerful features.

item.title: How to Create a Wapka Project: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to create a Wapka project with this step-by-step guide. Discover Wapka’s free plan, 100 GB cloud storage, and easy-to-use control panel for web development.

item.title: Introduction to Wapka: The Ultimate Web Development Platform
item.description: Discover Wapka: Your Go-To Web Development Platform and CMS for Building Modern Web Applications Are you ready to take your web development journey to new heights?
